title: Implement auto-update mechanism
description: Implement an automatic update mechanism for the openclaw npm package. Check the latest version on npm, compare with the currently installed version in the container, and if a newer version exists, pull the new image or update in place. Add a pnpm update:openclaw script.

title: Add local backup script for Headscale SQLite database
description: Implement a local backup strategy for the Headscale SQLite database used by the VPN coordinator. The backup.sh script already handles general backups; extend it to explicitly include the headscale-data volume. Verify restore procedure works.

title: Verify and document 70B model support
description: Analyze the current RAM usage when running the largest available model (34B). Document the memory headroom. If >= 40GB is available, uncomment the 70B model entries in infra/ollama/models.sh and update STATUS.md with the verification result.
